channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bucs with Bowles: Bucs finally see first place after a tough battle against Raiders
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers won their third straight game, 28-13, over the Las Vegas Raiders and climbed back into first place in the NFC South.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tennessee grabs No. 1 in AP Top 25 after shakeup; No. 3 Iowa State has highest ranking since 1950s
item.description: Tennessee is the new No. 1 in men's college basketball after a massive shakeup in the AP Top 25. The Vols received 58 first-place votes from a 62-person media panel Monday to reach No. 1 for the first time since the 2018-19 season.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: College football transfer portal opens as Oklahoma's Arnold, other top players look for a move
item.description: The college football transfer portal opened on Monday, a day after the inaugural 12-team College Football Playoff field was released. The portal period closes on Dec. 28.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Falcons should 'roll the dice' and start Michael Penix Jr amid Kirk Cousins struggles, Super Bowl champ says
item.description: Atlanta Falcons quarterback Kirk Cousins is facing enormous pressure and one Super Bowl champion is calling on the team to make a change in the final few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Social media influencer breaks silence on Sabrina Carpenter break up rumors after Olivia Dunne dis
item.description: Social media influencer Breckie Hill responded to rumors she was the reason why Sabrina Carpenter and Barry Keoghan broke up in recent weeks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Should Sasaki join Cubs? Emanuel, a fan of the team and ambassador to Japan, is being diplomatic
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — It was a simple question. During a news conference Monday at the United States Embassy in Tokyo, Chicago Cubs pitcher Shota Imanaga was asked what he'd say to countryman Roki Sasaki to convince him to join his team.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WADE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kyle Whittingham will return for 2025 season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a simple two word statement that made a resounding statement throughout the University of Utah athletic department. "I'm back." And with that, Utes head football coach Kyle Whittingham announced he will return to the program for his 21st season in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CU Buffaloes & CSU Rams are bowl eligible
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— If you're struggling to remember, you're not alone. But the University of Colorado and Colorado State University are changing that narrative this year. For the first time since 2016, both Colorado schools are bowling this postseason. First up, No. 23 Colorado.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Juan Soto's $765M deal with the Mets is the largest in MLB history. Here's who he passed
item.description: Juan Soto and the New York Mets agreed to a record $765 million, 15-year contract Sunday night, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: LeBron James misses 1st game this season, sidelined versus Portland due to left foot soreness
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James will sit out Sunday's game against the Portland Trail Blazers due to left foot soreness, the NBA career scoring leader's first missed game of the season.
item.dc:creator: DOUG PADILLA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chris Paul moves into 2nd on NBA's career assists list against Pelicans
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — San Antonio Spurs point guard Chris Paul moved to second on the NBA's all-time assists list against the New Orleans Pelicans, the franchise where his 20-year career began, on Sunday The 39-year-old Paul collected his 12,092nd assist on a 3-pointer from Victor Wembanyama with 7:06
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big Ten wins playoff selection derby, followed by SEC despite notable Alabama omission
item.description: College football's conference shakeup left concerns about two super conferences dominating the playoff field. They weren't totally unfounded or 100% borne out. The Big Ten, not the Southeastern Conference, was the biggest winner Sunday. The ACC scored, too.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kalani Sitake signs long-term contract extension
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off a 10-2 season, BYU has signed head coach Kalani Sitake to a long-term contract extension that will keep him in Provo well into the future.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: The Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O'Neill, according to a person familiar with the negotiations. The person spoke to The Associated Press on Saturday on condition of anonymity because the agreement was subject to a successful physical.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Anders Sorensen loses 1st game as interim Blackhawks coach
item.description: Anders Sorensen's first game with Chicago looked a lot like when Luke Richardson was coaching the Blackhawks.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes drop five-set thriller to Marquette to end season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah women's volleyball team rallied from being down two sets to none against Marquette, only to lose the fifth and deciding set 15-12 to end their incredible turnaround season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Batty, Ferrin named to All-Big 12 first team
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Three Cougars were named first-team All-Big 12 including defensive end Tyler Batty, offensive left tackle Caleb Etienne and kicker Will Ferrin. In addition, senior defensive back Jakob Robinson and junior kick returner Keelan Marion earned All-Big 12 Second Team honors.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Westfall's live commitment, Akili to Oregon lead National Signing Day in San Diego
item.description: Silver Pigskin winner Akili Smith Jr went to the same program his father helped build, choosing Oregon Wednesday morning. His Silver Pigskin finalist teammate Aden Jackson is staying closer to home, going with UC Davis.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5

item.title: Little G: 12-year-old skateboarding prodigy aims for SLS and Olympic gold
item.description: Guerlain Girardin, also known as Little G, is a 12-year-old skateboarder who skates 7 days a week. He has already won the European championship and the California games in the U14 category.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5
